new_value: {"description":"Add comprehensive structured logging for all TX and RX paths across: Python simulator (enhance existing _debug_log calls), Renode C# peripherals (LichenSubGHz.cs, SX1262.cs), native Zephyr drivers (lora_sim.c, lora_renode.c), and renode_server.py. Include node_id, state, timings, queue lengths, RSSI/SNR where applicable. Integrate and expand test_simulation_logging.py and Renode integration tests to verify the new logs. Ensure logs use consistent structured format (structlog in Python, LOG_DBG in C). Close when verified with pytest and Renode tests.","title":"Add detailed TX/RX logging in simulator, Renode peripherals, native"}

Added detailed TX/RX logging with node_state/pending_txs/event_queue_len/current_time_us to simulator _handle_tx_end/_handle_rx_timeout (fixed node scoping); added/enhanced LOG_DBG in native lora_sim.c and lora_renode.c for successful/failed TX/RX with sizes/RSSI/SNR; updated renode_server.py debug messages; expanded test_simulation_logging.py to cover tx_end + new fields (3/3 tests pass). Verified with pytest.
